DIS.rationale: Strong earnings recovery (EPS from $0.26 to $1.81) and positive sentiment support a mild long lean, but the stock has already rallied +25.6% in 3 months to a new 52-week high, limiting risk-adjusted upside.
key_factors: EPS recovery from $0.26 (Q3 2024) to $1.81 (Q2 2025) signals fundamental turnaround
P/E of 23.8x sits in the lower portion of 1-year range (19.6-64.4x), reasonable but not cheap given the run-up
Stock at new 52-week high with +25.6% 3-month return, much of the recovery priced in
News sentiment trending positive (+1.00 on last 3 readings) but momentum may be exhausted near-term
Operating margin of 18.5% and ROE of 8.7% indicate improving profitability

sources_cited.excerpt: Can Disney Stock Keep Rising After Hitting a New 52-Week High?
